task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot showing the Jitsi Meet interface branding was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot (presumably focus_mode_branding.png) showing the Jitsi Meet web interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the application name is set to 'ExamPortal'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'ExamPortal' should be visible in the Jitsi Meet interface, typically in the browser tab title, the header, or as a watermark.

task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot showing the Jitsi Meet toolbar was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot (presumably focus_mode_toolbar.png) showing the bottom toolbar of the Jitsi Meet interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the toolbar contains all the allowed buttons.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toolbar must show icons for: microphone, camera, share desktop (monitor), fullscreen (expand arrows), hangup (red phone), raise hand, chat (speech bubble), and tile view (grid).

task_completion.description: Verify that the toolbar does NOT contain any extra or forbidden buttons.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toolbar must ONLY contain the allowed buttons. It should NOT show icons for invite (person with +), security (shield), settings (gear), video quality, filmstrip, shortcuts, or stats.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshots show an actual web browser rendering Jitsi Meet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a genuine browser window (like Chrome or Firefox) displaying the Jitsi Meet web interface, not a text editor showing configuration code.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshots were not manually edited to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: No signs of MS Paint or other image editing software being used to paste the word 'ExamPortal' or cover up toolbar buttons.

integrity.description: Verify that the interface is a genuine Jitsi Meet instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The layout, styling, and icons should match the standard Jitsi Meet application, rather than a mocked-up HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected application name is 'ExamPortal'. The allowed toolbar buttons are: microphone, camera, desktop (share screen), fullscreen, hangup, raisehand, chat, and tileview. Forbidden buttons that should NOT be visible include: invite, security, videoquality, filmstrip, shortcuts, stats, and settings.
